title: ICC God Mode — Master
subtitle: All-in-one overlay — start here
description: Five tools merged into a single overlay. Daily VWAP, session liquidity rays with sweep alerts, HTF OHLC labels, proper SMC swing breaker walls, and a trend engine with live dashboard.

features.label: Daily VWAP
features.desc: Auto-anchored, resets at each new day open. Optional ±1σ bands.

features.label: Session Rays
features.desc: Asia / TWT / US session H+L markers + extending rays. Alert fires the moment a level is wicked.

features.label: HTF OHLC Labels
features.desc: Configurable HTF — labels every Open / High / Low / Close (e.g. 4H Open $X) for last N periods.

features.label: Swing Breaker Walls
features.desc: Proper SMC breaker logic. Broken swing HIGH → bullish breaker (support zone). Mitigated when price closes back through.

features.label: Trend Engine
features.desc: 200 EMA + configurable baseline EMA. Drives the wall mode trend filter.

features.label: Dashboard
features.desc: Trend / VWAP / Bull & Bear wall counts / Active session / HTF range — top-right table.

settings: Dashboard → Label Size: set to 'normal' or 'large' if text is too small on mobile.
code:
//@version=6
// =============================================================================
// ICC GOD MODE — MASTER (Cesar's Custom)
// =============================================================================
// Combines five tools into one cohesive overlay:
//
//   1. TREND ENGINE          — 200 EMA + configurable baseline → Bull/Bear/Range
//   2. DAILY VWAP            — auto-anchored, resets each new day session
//   3. SESSION LIQUIDITY     — Asia / TWT / US session H+L markers and rays;
//                              alerts when swept (wick or close)
//   4. HTF OHLC LABELS       — pick any HTF, last N periods get O/H/L/C labels
//   5. SWING BREAKER WALLS   — proper SMC breaker block logic: a broken swing
//                              flips polarity into support/resistance, mitigated
//                              when price closes back through. Trend filter mode.
//   + Dashboard table + Alert conditions for everything that matters.
//
// Strict v6 — no transp, no resolution, no negative loops, no repainting.
// =============================================================================

indicator("ICC God Mode — Master [Cesar]", "ICC GM-M", overlay=true,
     max_lines_count=500, max_labels_count=500, max_boxes_count=500)

// =============================================================================
// 1. INPUTS
// =============================================================================
gTrend       = "Trend Engine"
showEMA      = input.bool(true,  "Show 200 EMA",          group=gTrend)
emaLen       = input.int(200,    "EMA Length", minval=20, group=gTrend)
showBaseline = input.bool(true,  "Show Trend Baseline",   group=gTrend)
baselineLen  = input.int(34,     "Baseline EMA Length", minval=10, maxval=200, group=gTrend)

gVWAP        = "Daily VWAP (Anchored)"
showVWAP     = input.bool(true,  "Show VWAP",            group=gVWAP)
showBands    = input.bool(false, "Show ±1σ Bands",       group=gVWAP)
vwapCol      = input.color(#ffa726, "VWAP Color",        group=gVWAP)

gSession     = "Session Liquidity"
showSessions = input.bool(true, "Show Sessions",         group=gSession)
asiaSes      = input.session("1800-0300", "Asia Session (NY time)", group=gSession)
twtSes       = input.session("0300-0800", "TWT Session (NY time)",  group=gSession, tooltip="London/Frankfurt window")
usSes        = input.session("0800-1700", "US Session (NY time)",   group=gSession)
sesTZ        = input.string("America/New_York", "Session Timezone", group=gSession)
asiaCol      = input.color(#ef5350, "Asia Color", group=gSession)
twtCol       = input.color(#26c6da, "TWT Color",  group=gSession)
usCol        = input.color(#ab47bc, "US Color",   group=gSession)
fadeSwept    = input.bool(true, "Fade Swept Rays", group=gSession)
maxRayDays   = input.int(5, "Max Days of Rays Visible", minval=1, maxval=20, group=gSession)

gHTF         = "HTF OHLC Labels"
showHTF      = input.bool(true, "Show HTF OHLC Labels", group=gHTF)
htfTF        = input.timeframe("240", "HTF Timeframe", options=["15","30","60","120","240","D","W","M"], group=gHTF)
maxHTFPer    = input.int(2, "Max HTF Periods Visible", minval=1, maxval=6, group=gHTF)
htfOpenCol   = input.color(#ef5350, "HTF Open",  group=gHTF)
htfHighCol   = input.color(#37474f, "HTF High",  group=gHTF)
htfLowCol    = input.color(#37474f, "HTF Low",   group=gHTF)
htfCloseCol  = input.color(#26a69a, "HTF Close", group=gHTF)

gWalls       = "Swing Breaker Walls"
showWalls    = input.bool(true, "Show Breaker Walls", group=gWalls)
swingLen     = input.int(5, "Swing Pivot Length", minval=2, maxval=20, group=gWalls)
wallMode     = input.string("Trend Following", "Wall Mode", options=["Trend Following","Counter-Trend","Both"], group=gWalls)
thicknessSrc = input.string("Wick-to-Body", "Wall Thickness Source", options=["Wick-to-Body","ATR","Fixed"], group=gWalls)
atrLen       = input.int(14, "ATR Length", minval=5, maxval=50, group=gWalls)
atrMult      = input.float(0.35, "ATR Wall Thickness", minval=0.05, maxval=2.0, step=0.05, group=gWalls)
fixedTicks   = input.float(10.0, "Fixed Thickness (ticks)", minval=1, group=gWalls)
maxWalls     = input.int(8, "Max Active Walls per Side", minval=2, maxval=20, group=gWalls)
mitigationT  = input.string("Wick", "Mitigation Test", options=["Wick","Body Close"], group=gWalls)
bullWallCol  = input.color(#26a69a, "Bullish Breaker", group=gWalls)
bearWallCol  = input.color(#ef5350, "Bearish Breaker", group=gWalls)

gDash        = "Dashboard"
showDash     = input.bool(true, "Show Dashboard", group=gDash)
dashPos      = input.string("top_right", "Position", options=["top_right","top_left","bottom_right","bottom_left","middle_right"], group=gDash)
dashSize     = input.string("normal", "Size", options=["tiny","small","normal","large"], group=gDash)
labelSize    = input.string("small", "Label Size (rays, OHLC, walls)", options=["tiny","small","normal","large"], group=gDash, tooltip="If text is too small on your screen, increase this.")

// Derived size constants — computed once, used everywhere
lbSize  = labelSize == "tiny" ? size.tiny : labelSize == "normal" ? size.normal : labelSize == "large" ? size.large : size.small

// =============================================================================
// 2. TYPES & METHODS
// =============================================================================
type SessionRay
    line   hRay
    line   lRay
    label  hLabel
    label  lLabel
    string name
    color  clr
    float  hPrice
    float  lPrice
    bool   hSwept
    bool   lSwept
    int    startBar

type Breaker
    box   bx
    label lb
    float lvl
    int   birth
    bool  isBull
    bool  mitigated

method dispose(SessionRay this) =>
    if not na(this.hRay)
        line.delete(this.hRay)
    if not na(this.lRay)
        line.delete(this.lRay)
    if not na(this.hLabel)
        label.delete(this.hLabel)
    if not na(this.lLabel)
        label.delete(this.lLabel)

method dispose(Breaker this) =>
    if not na(this.bx)
        box.delete(this.bx)
    if not na(this.lb)
        label.delete(this.lb)

// =============================================================================
// 3. PERSISTENT VARIABLES
// =============================================================================
var array<SessionRay> rays         = array.new<SessionRay>()
var array<Breaker>    bullBreakers = array.new<Breaker>()
var array<Breaker>    bearBreakers = array.new<Breaker>()

// Pending swings (haven't broken yet)
var array<float> pendHighs    = array.new<float>()
var array<int>   pendHighBars = array.new<int>()
var array<float> pendLows     = array.new<float>()
var array<int>   pendLowBars  = array.new<int>()

// Session in-progress tracking
var float asiaH = na, var float asiaL = na, var int asiaStartBar = na
var float twtH  = na, var float twtL  = na, var int twtStartBar  = na
var float usH   = na, var float usL   = na, var int usStartBar   = na

// HTF period in-progress tracking
var int   htfStart = na
var float htfO     = na
var float htfH     = na
var float htfL     = na
var int   htfHbar  = na
var int   htfLbar  = na
var array<label> htfLabels = array.new<label>()

// =============================================================================
// 4. CORE CALCULATIONS
// =============================================================================
ema200    = ta.ema(close, emaLen)
baseline  = ta.ema(close, baselineLen)
trendBull = close > ema200 and close > baseline
trendBear = close < ema200 and close < baseline
trendStr  = trendBull ? "Bullish" : trendBear ? "Bearish" : "Range"

isNewDay = ta.change(time("D")) != 0
[vwap, vwapU, vwapL] = ta.vwap(hlc3, isNewDay, 1.0)

atrVal = ta.atr(atrLen)

// Session presence
asiaIn  = not na(time("", asiaSes, sesTZ))
twtIn   = not na(time("", twtSes,  sesTZ))
usIn    = not na(time("", usSes,   sesTZ))
asiaSt  = asiaIn and not asiaIn[1]
twtSt   = twtIn  and not twtIn[1]
usSt    = usIn   and not usIn[1]
asiaEnd = not asiaIn and asiaIn[1]
twtEnd  = not twtIn  and twtIn[1]
usEnd   = not usIn   and usIn[1]

// =============================================================================
// 5. SESSION TRACKING + RAYS
// =============================================================================
// Track Asia
if asiaSt
    asiaH := high
    asiaL := low
    asiaStartBar := bar_index
else if asiaIn
    asiaH := math.max(asiaH, high)
    asiaL := math.min(asiaL, low)

// Track TWT
if twtSt
    twtH := high
    twtL := low
    twtStartBar := bar_index
else if twtIn
    twtH := math.max(twtH, high)
    twtL := math.min(twtL, low)

// Track US
if usSt
    usH := high
    usL := low
    usStartBar := bar_index
else if usIn
    usH := math.max(usH, high)
    usL := math.min(usL, low)

// Function to spawn a session ray pair (helper)
spawnRays(string name, color clr, float hPx, float lPx, int startBar) =>
    sr = SessionRay.new()
    sr.hRay := line.new(startBar, hPx, bar_index, hPx, color=clr, width=1, extend=extend.right, xloc=xloc.bar_index)
    sr.lRay := line.new(startBar, lPx, bar_index, lPx, color=clr, width=1, extend=extend.right, xloc=xloc.bar_index)
    sr.hLabel := label.new(bar_index, hPx, "▼ " + name, color=color.new(color.black, 100), textcolor=clr, style=label.style_label_down, size=lbSize, xloc=xloc.bar_index)
    sr.lLabel := label.new(bar_index, lPx, "▲ " + name, color=color.new(color.black, 100), textcolor=clr, style=label.style_label_up, size=lbSize, xloc=xloc.bar_index)
    sr.name := name
    sr.clr := clr
    sr.hPrice := hPx
    sr.lPrice := lPx
    sr.hSwept := false
    sr.lSwept := false
    sr.startBar := startBar
    sr

// On session END, snapshot and spawn rays
if showSessions and asiaEnd and not na(asiaH)
    array.push(rays, spawnRays("ASIA", asiaCol, asiaH, asiaL, asiaStartBar))
if showSessions and twtEnd and not na(twtH)
    array.push(rays, spawnRays("TWT", twtCol, twtH, twtL, twtStartBar))
if showSessions and usEnd and not na(usH)
    array.push(rays, spawnRays("US", usCol, usH, usL, usStartBar))

// Sweep flags (bar-level)
asiaHSwept = false
asiaLSwept = false
twtHSwept  = false
twtLSwept  = false
usHSwept   = false
usLSwept   = false

if array.size(rays) > 0
    for i = 0 to array.size(rays) - 1
        r = array.get(rays, i)
        if not r.hSwept and high >= r.hPrice and barstate.isconfirmed
            r.hSwept := true
            if r.name == "ASIA"
                asiaHSwept := true
            if r.name == "TWT"
                twtHSwept := true
            if r.name == "US"
                usHSwept := true
            if fadeSwept
                line.set_color(r.hRay, color.new(r.clr, 70))
                line.set_style(r.hRay, line.style_dashed)
                label.set_text(r.hLabel, "💀 " + r.name + " H")
        if not r.lSwept and low <= r.lPrice and barstate.isconfirmed
            r.lSwept := true
            if r.name == "ASIA"
                asiaLSwept := true
            if r.name == "TWT"
                twtLSwept := true
            if r.name == "US"
                usLSwept := true
            if fadeSwept
                line.set_color(r.lRay, color.new(r.clr, 70))
                line.set_style(r.lRay, line.style_dashed)
                label.set_text(r.lLabel, "💀 " + r.name + " L")

// Prune old rays — cap visible to maxRayDays * 3 sessions = ~15
maxKeep = maxRayDays * 3
while array.size(rays) > maxKeep
    old = array.shift(rays)
    old.dispose()

// Re-anchor labels at right edge for visibility on last bar
if barstate.islast and array.size(rays) > 0
    for i = 0 to array.size(rays) - 1
        r = array.get(rays, i)
        label.set_x(r.hLabel, bar_index + 5)
        label.set_x(r.lLabel, bar_index + 5)

// =============================================================================
// 6. HTF OHLC LABELS
// =============================================================================
isNewHTF = ta.change(time(htfTF)) != 0

if showHTF and isNewHTF and not na(htfStart) and barstate.isconfirmed
    // Just-closed period: emit O/H/L/C labels
    olbl = label.new(htfStart, htfO, htfTF + " O " + str.tostring(htfO, format.mintick), color=color.new(color.black, 100), textcolor=htfOpenCol, style=label.style_label_left, size=lbSize, xloc=xloc.bar_index)
    clbl = label.new(bar_index - 1, close[1], htfTF + " C " + str.tostring(close[1], format.mintick), color=color.new(color.black, 100), textcolor=htfCloseCol, style=label.style_label_right, size=lbSize, xloc=xloc.bar_index)
    hlbl = label.new(htfHbar, htfH, htfTF + " H " + str.tostring(htfH, format.mintick), color=color.new(color.black, 100), textcolor=htfHighCol, style=label.style_label_down, size=lbSize, xloc=xloc.bar_index)
    llbl = label.new(htfLbar, htfL, htfTF + " L " + str.tostring(htfL, format.mintick), color=color.new(color.black, 100), textcolor=htfLowCol, style=label.style_label_up, size=lbSize, xloc=xloc.bar_index)
    array.push(htfLabels, olbl)
    array.push(htfLabels, clbl)
    array.push(htfLabels, hlbl)
    array.push(htfLabels, llbl)
    while array.size(htfLabels) > maxHTFPer * 4
        old = array.shift(htfLabels)
        if not na(old)
            label.delete(old)

// Track HTF in-progress
if isNewHTF
    htfStart := bar_index
    htfO     := open
    htfH     := high
    htfL     := low
    htfHbar  := bar_index
    htfLbar  := bar_index
else
    if high > htfH
        htfH    := high
        htfHbar := bar_index
    if low < htfL
        htfL    := low
        htfLbar := bar_index

// =============================================================================
// 7. SWING BREAKER WALLS
// =============================================================================
ph = ta.pivothigh(swingLen, swingLen)
pl = ta.pivotlow(swingLen, swingLen)

// Add new pending swings
if not na(ph) and barstate.isconfirmed
    array.push(pendHighs, ph)
    array.push(pendHighBars, bar_index - swingLen)
    while array.size(pendHighs) > 25
        array.shift(pendHighs)
        array.shift(pendHighBars)

if not na(pl) and barstate.isconfirmed
    array.push(pendLows, pl)
    array.push(pendLowBars, bar_index - swingLen)
    while array.size(pendLows) > 25
        array.shift(pendLows)
        array.shift(pendLowBars)

// Compute wall thickness
wallThick(float refPx) =>
    thick = thicknessSrc == "ATR" ? atrVal * atrMult :
             thicknessSrc == "Wick-to-Body" ? math.max(math.abs(open - close), atrVal * 0.1) :
             fixedTicks * syminfo.mintick
    thick

// Determine show flags based on wall mode + trend
showBullWall = wallMode == "Both" or (wallMode == "Trend Following" and trendBull) or (wallMode == "Counter-Trend" and not trendBull)
showBearWall = wallMode == "Both" or (wallMode == "Trend Following" and trendBear) or (wallMode == "Counter-Trend" and not trendBear)

// Check pending highs — if close > swing high → bullish breaker
i = 0
while i < array.size(pendHighs) and barstate.isconfirmed
    sh = array.get(pendHighs, i)
    sb = array.get(pendHighBars, i)
    if close > sh
        if showWalls and showBullWall
            tk = wallThick(sh)
            br = Breaker.new()
            br.bx := box.new(sb, sh + tk, bar_index + 50, sh - tk, border_color=bullWallCol, border_width=1, bgcolor=color.new(bullWallCol, 80), xloc=xloc.bar_index)
            br.lb := label.new(bar_index + 50, sh, "↑ BULL BRK " + str.tostring(sh, format.mintick), color=color.new(color.black, 100), textcolor=bullWallCol, style=label.style_label_left, size=lbSize, xloc=xloc.bar_index)
            br.lvl := sh
            br.birth := sb
            br.isBull := true
            br.mitigated := false
            array.push(bullBreakers, br)
            while array.size(bullBreakers) > maxWalls
                old = array.shift(bullBreakers)
                old.dispose()
        array.remove(pendHighs, i)
        array.remove(pendHighBars, i)
    else
        i += 1

// Check pending lows — if close < swing low → bearish breaker
i := 0
while i < array.size(pendLows) and barstate.isconfirmed
    sl = array.get(pendLows, i)
    sb = array.get(pendLowBars, i)
    if close < sl
        if showWalls and showBearWall
            tk = wallThick(sl)
            br = Breaker.new()
            br.bx := box.new(sb, sl + tk, bar_index + 50, sl - tk, border_color=bearWallCol, border_width=1, bgcolor=color.new(bearWallCol, 80), xloc=xloc.bar_index)
            br.lb := label.new(bar_index + 50, sl, "↓ BEAR BRK " + str.tostring(sl, format.mintick), color=color.new(color.black, 100), textcolor=bearWallCol, style=label.style_label_left, size=lbSize, xloc=xloc.bar_index)
            br.lvl := sl
            br.birth := sb
            br.isBull := false
            br.mitigated := false
            array.push(bearBreakers, br)
            while array.size(bearBreakers) > maxWalls
                old = array.shift(bearBreakers)
                old.dispose()
        array.remove(pendLows, i)
        array.remove(pendLowBars, i)
    else
        i += 1

// Mitigation check on bull breakers
bullBrkMitigated = false
if array.size(bullBreakers) > 0
    for j = 0 to array.size(bullBreakers) - 1
        br = array.get(bullBreakers, j)
        if not br.mitigated
            test = mitigationT == "Wick" ? low : math.min(open, close)
            if test < br.lvl - wallThick(br.lvl) and barstate.isconfirmed
                br.mitigated := true
                bullBrkMitigated := true
                box.set_bgcolor(br.bx, color.new(bullWallCol, 95))
                box.set_border_color(br.bx, color.new(bullWallCol, 50))
                label.set_text(br.lb, "✗ MIT BULL")
                label.set_textcolor(br.lb, color.new(bullWallCol, 30))

// Mitigation check on bear breakers
bearBrkMitigated = false
if array.size(bearBreakers) > 0
    for j = 0 to array.size(bearBreakers) - 1
        br = array.get(bearBreakers, j)
        if not br.mitigated
            test = mitigationT == "Wick" ? high : math.max(open, close)
            if test > br.lvl + wallThick(br.lvl) and barstate.isconfirmed
                br.mitigated := true
                bearBrkMitigated := true
                box.set_bgcolor(br.bx, color.new(bearWallCol, 95))
                box.set_border_color(br.bx, color.new(bearWallCol, 50))
                label.set_text(br.lb, "✗ MIT BEAR")
                label.set_textcolor(br.lb, color.new(bearWallCol, 30))

// Extend right edge of active breakers on last bar
if barstate.islast
    if array.size(bullBreakers) > 0
        for j = 0 to array.size(bullBreakers) - 1
            br = array.get(bullBreakers, j)
            if not br.mitigated
                box.set_right(br.bx, bar_index + 50)
                label.set_x(br.lb, bar_index + 50)
    if array.size(bearBreakers) > 0
        for j = 0 to array.size(bearBreakers) - 1
            br = array.get(bearBreakers, j)
            if not br.mitigated
                box.set_right(br.bx, bar_index + 50)
                label.set_x(br.lb, bar_index + 50)

// =============================================================================
// 8. PLOTS
// =============================================================================
plot(showEMA      ? ema200 : na, "200 EMA",   color=trendBull ? color.new(#26a69a, 30) : color.new(#ef5350, 30), linewidth=2)
plot(showBaseline ? baseline : na, "Baseline EMA", color=color.new(#9e9e9e, 30), linewidth=1)
plot(showVWAP     ? vwap   : na, "VWAP",      color=vwapCol, linewidth=2)
plot(showVWAP and showBands ? vwapU : na, "VWAP +1σ", color=color.new(vwapCol, 60), linewidth=1)
plot(showVWAP and showBands ? vwapL : na, "VWAP -1σ", color=color.new(vwapCol, 60), linewidth=1)

// =============================================================================
// 9. ALERTS
// =============================================================================
alertcondition(asiaHSwept, "Asia High Swept", "🩸 Liquidity sweep: ASIA HIGH on {{ticker}} {{interval}}")
alertcondition(asiaLSwept, "Asia Low Swept",  "🩸 Liquidity sweep: ASIA LOW on {{ticker}} {{interval}}")
alertcondition(twtHSwept,  "TWT High Swept",  "🩸 Liquidity sweep: TWT HIGH on {{ticker}} {{interval}}")
alertcondition(twtLSwept,  "TWT Low Swept",   "🩸 Liquidity sweep: TWT LOW on {{ticker}} {{interval}}")
alertcondition(usHSwept,   "US High Swept",   "🩸 Liquidity sweep: US HIGH on {{ticker}} {{interval}}")
alertcondition(usLSwept,   "US Low Swept",    "🩸 Liquidity sweep: US LOW on {{ticker}} {{interval}}")
alertcondition(bullBrkMitigated, "Bull Breaker Mitigated", "✗ Bull breaker invalidated on {{ticker}}")
alertcondition(bearBrkMitigated, "Bear Breaker Mitigated", "✗ Bear breaker invalidated on {{ticker}}")

// =============================================================================
// 10. DASHBOARD
// =============================================================================
posVal  = dashPos == "top_left" ? position.top_left : dashPos == "bottom_right" ? position.bottom_right : dashPos == "bottom_left" ? position.bottom_left : dashPos == "middle_right" ? position.middle_right : position.top_right
sizeVal = dashSize == "tiny" ? size.tiny : dashSize == "small" ? size.small : dashSize == "large" ? size.large : size.normal
var table dash = table.new(posVal, 2, 7, frame_color=color.gray, frame_width=1, border_color=color.new(color.gray, 50), border_width=1)

if showDash and barstate.islast
    trendCol = trendBull ? bullWallCol : trendBear ? bearWallCol : color.gray
    vwapPos  = close > vwap ? "Above ▲" : "Below ▼"
    vwapPosCol = close > vwap ? bullWallCol : bearWallCol

    // Active breakers
    activeBull = 0
    if array.size(bullBreakers) > 0
        for j = 0 to array.size(bullBreakers) - 1
            if not array.get(bullBreakers, j).mitigated
                activeBull += 1
    activeBear = 0
    if array.size(bearBreakers) > 0
        for j = 0 to array.size(bearBreakers) - 1
            if not array.get(bearBreakers, j).mitigated
                activeBear += 1

    activeSession = asiaIn ? "🇯🇵 ASIA" : twtIn ? "🌅 TWT" : usIn ? "🇺🇸 US" : "💤 None"
    activeSessionCol = asiaIn ? asiaCol : twtIn ? twtCol : usIn ? usCol : color.gray

    table.cell(dash, 0, 0, "ICC GOD MODE", text_color=color.white, bgcolor=color.new(color.black, 0),  text_size=sizeVal)
    table.cell(dash, 1, 0, syminfo.ticker,  text_color=color.white, bgcolor=color.new(color.black, 0),  text_size=sizeVal)

    table.cell(dash, 0, 1, "Trend",        text_color=color.white, bgcolor=color.new(color.black, 50), text_size=sizeVal)
    table.cell(dash, 1, 1, trendStr,        text_color=color.white, bgcolor=color.new(trendCol, 50),    text_size=sizeVal)

    table.cell(dash, 0, 2, "VWAP",          text_color=color.white, bgcolor=color.new(color.black, 50), text_size=sizeVal)
    table.cell(dash, 1, 2, vwapPos,         text_color=color.white, bgcolor=color.new(vwapPosCol, 50),  text_size=sizeVal)

    table.cell(dash, 0, 3, "🟢 Bull Walls", text_color=color.white, bgcolor=color.new(color.black, 50), text_size=sizeVal)
    table.cell(dash, 1, 3, str.tostring(activeBull), text_color=color.white, bgcolor=color.new(bullWallCol, 50), text_size=sizeVal)

    table.cell(dash, 0, 4, "🔴 Bear Walls", text_color=color.white, bgcolor=color.new(color.black, 50), text_size=sizeVal)
    table.cell(dash, 1, 4, str.tostring(activeBear), text_color=color.white, bgcolor=color.new(bearWallCol, 50), text_size=sizeVal)

    table.cell(dash, 0, 5, "Session",       text_color=color.white, bgcolor=color.new(color.black, 50), text_size=sizeVal)
    table.cell(dash, 1, 5, activeSession,   text_color=color.white, bgcolor=color.new(activeSessionCol, 50), text_size=sizeVal)

    table.cell(dash, 0, 6, "HTF (" + htfTF + ")", text_color=color.white, bgcolor=color.new(color.black, 50), text_size=sizeVal)
    htfRange = na(htfH) or na(htfL) ? "—" : str.tostring(htfL, format.mintick) + " / " + str.tostring(htfH, format.mintick)
    table.cell(dash, 1, 6, htfRange, text_color=color.white, bgcolor=color.new(color.black, 70), text_size=sizeVal)

title: ICC God Mode — Crypto
subtitle: ICC state machine overlay
description: Automates the full ICC sequence — Indication → Correction → CHoCH → BOS — with a live GO/NO-GO dashboard. Crypto-tuned, 24/7, no session or ATH veto.

features.label: HTF Indication
features.desc: Detects when 4H/1H body-closes beyond a confirmed swing pivot.

features.label: Correction Tracking
features.desc: 50% retrace toward the previous push. Shows when the market is breathing.

features.label: CHoCH + BOS
features.desc: CHoCH = early entry. BOS = confirmed. Both labeled on chart.

features.label: Final Boss Target
features.desc: Dashed yellow line at the untested HTF extreme — your primary TP.

features.label: Buy/Sell Walls
features.desc: Liquidity zones at confirmed swing pivots, faded to 💀 when swept.

features.label: GO/NO-GO Dashboard
features.desc: Live ICC checklist — NO SETUP → AWAITING C → ARMING → EARLY → GO.

settings: HTF Timeframe (default 1H), LTF Swing Length, Dashboard position/size.
code:
//@version=6
// =============================================================================
// ICC GOD MODE — CRYPTO EDITION
// =============================================================================
// Mechanizes the ICC framework (Indication → Correction → Continuation):
//
//   • HTF Indication : Higher-timeframe BODY close beyond a confirmed swing pivot
//   • Correction     : Price retraces toward the "previous push" level (50%)
//   • Continuation   : LTF CHoCH (early entry) → BOS (confirmed entry)
//
// Plus Buy/Sell Walls — every confirmed swing pivot becomes a liquidity wall:
//   • Sell Wall above a swing high (sellers + resting stops on shorts)
//   • Buy Wall  below a swing low  (buyers  + resting stops on longs)
// Walls fade once swept (price wicks through their level).
//
// Crypto-tuned: 24/7, no session veto, no ATH veto.
// Strict v6 — no transp, no resolution, no negative-step loops, no repainting.
// =============================================================================

indicator("ICC God Mode — Crypto", "ICC GM", overlay=true, max_lines_count=500, max_labels_count=500, max_boxes_count=500)

// =============================================================================
// 1. INPUTS
// =============================================================================
gHTF        = "HTF & Structure"
htfTF       = input.timeframe("60", "HTF Timeframe (Indication)", options=["15","30","60","240","D","W"], group=gHTF, tooltip="Use 60 (1H) or 240 (4H) for intraday. D/W for swing.")
swingLenH   = input.int(5, "HTF Swing Length",  minval=2, maxval=20, group=gHTF)
swingLenL   = input.int(3, "LTF Swing Length",  minval=2, maxval=10, group=gHTF, tooltip="Pivot lookback on the chart timeframe. Drives walls and CHoCH/BOS.")

gWall       = "Buy/Sell Walls (Liquidity)"
showWalls   = input.bool(true, "Show Walls",                 group=gWall)
maxWalls    = input.int(6, "Max Active Walls per Side",      minval=2, maxval=15, group=gWall)
wallExtend  = input.int(80, "Wall Extension (bars)",         minval=20, maxval=500, group=gWall)
wallShowDead = input.bool(true, "Keep Swept Walls (faded)",  group=gWall, tooltip="Show 💀 markers where liquidity was already taken.")

gEMA        = "Trend Baseline"
showEMA     = input.bool(true, "Show 200 EMA", group=gEMA)
emaLen      = input.int(200, "EMA Length",     minval=20, group=gEMA)

gFB         = "Final Boss (Target)"
showFB      = input.bool(true, "Show Final Boss Line", group=gFB)

gDash       = "Dashboard"
showDash    = input.bool(true, "Show ICC Dashboard", group=gDash)
dashPos     = input.string("top_right", "Position", options=["top_right","top_left","bottom_right","bottom_left","middle_right"], group=gDash)
dashSize    = input.string("normal", "Size",        options=["tiny","small","normal","large"], group=gDash)

gColor      = "Colors"
bullCol     = input.color(#26a69a, "Bullish",            group=gColor)
bearCol     = input.color(#ef5350, "Bearish",            group=gColor)
buyWallCol  = input.color(#26a69a, "Buy Wall (Demand)",  group=gColor)
sellWallCol = input.color(#ef5350, "Sell Wall (Supply)", group=gColor)
fbCol       = input.color(#ffeb3b, "Final Boss",         group=gColor)

// =============================================================================
// 2. TYPES & METHODS
// =============================================================================
type Wall
    box   bx
    label lb
    float lvl
    int   birth
    bool  isBuy
    bool  swept

method dispose(Wall this) =>
    if not na(this.bx)
        box.delete(this.bx)
    if not na(this.lb)
        label.delete(this.lb)

// =============================================================================
// 3. PERSISTENT VARIABLES
// =============================================================================
var array<Wall> buyWalls  = array.new<Wall>()
var array<Wall> sellWalls = array.new<Wall>()

// HTF pivot tracking — need previous TWO pivots to detect a body break
var float htfPH1 = na
var float htfPH2 = na
var float htfPL1 = na
var float htfPL2 = na

// ICC state machine
var int   icDir          = 0       //  1 bull, -1 bear, 0 none
var float icPivot        = na      // the swing pivot whose break = Indication
var float icPrevPush     = na      // the swing that started the impulse
var float finalBoss      = na      // untested HTF extreme — primary target
var int   icBar          = na

var bool  corrActive     = false
var bool  chochFired     = false
var bool  bosFired       = false
var float chochLvl       = na
var float bosLvl         = na
var float lastLowAfterC  = na
var float lastHighAfterC = na

var float entryPx        = na
var float stopPx         = na

var line  fbLine         = na

// =============================================================================
// 4. CORE CALCULATIONS
// =============================================================================
ema200 = ta.ema(close, emaLen)
emaUp  = close > ema200

// HTF data — non-repainting via close[1] + lookahead_on
htfClose = request.security(syminfo.tickerid, htfTF, close[1], lookahead=barmerge.lookahead_on)

// HTF pivots — confirmed by their own right-side bars on the HTF (non-repainting)
htfPH = request.security(syminfo.tickerid, htfTF, ta.pivothigh(swingLenH, swingLenH), lookahead=barmerge.lookahead_on)
htfPL = request.security(syminfo.tickerid, htfTF, ta.pivotlow(swingLenH,  swingLenH), lookahead=barmerge.lookahead_on)

if not na(htfPH) and htfPH != htfPH1
    htfPH2 := htfPH1
    htfPH1 := htfPH
if not na(htfPL) and htfPL != htfPL1
    htfPL2 := htfPL1
    htfPL1 := htfPL

// LTF pivots on chart TF
ltfPH = ta.pivothigh(swingLenL, swingLenL)
ltfPL = ta.pivotlow(swingLenL,  swingLenL)

// ATR for wall thickness
atrW = ta.atr(14) * 0.15

// =============================================================================
// 5. DRAWING — Walls
// =============================================================================
// Add SELL wall on confirmed LTF pivot high (resistance + buy-side liquidity above)
if showWalls and not na(ltfPH) and barstate.isconfirmed
    pBar = bar_index - swingLenL
    w = Wall.new()
    w.bx    := box.new(pBar, ltfPH + atrW, bar_index + wallExtend, ltfPH, border_color=sellWallCol, border_width=1, bgcolor=color.new(sellWallCol, 80), xloc=xloc.bar_index)
    w.lb    := label.new(bar_index + wallExtend, ltfPH + atrW * 0.5, "🧱 SELL " + str.tostring(ltfPH, format.mintick), color=color.new(color.black, 100), textcolor=sellWallCol, style=label.style_label_left, size=size.small, xloc=xloc.bar_index)
    w.lvl   := ltfPH
    w.birth := pBar
    w.isBuy := false
    w.swept := false
    array.push(sellWalls, w)
    while array.size(sellWalls) > maxWalls
        old = array.shift(sellWalls)
        old.dispose()

// Add BUY wall on confirmed LTF pivot low (support + sell-side liquidity below)
if showWalls and not na(ltfPL) and barstate.isconfirmed
    pBar = bar_index - swingLenL
    w = Wall.new()
    w.bx    := box.new(pBar, ltfPL, bar_index + wallExtend, ltfPL - atrW, border_color=buyWallCol, border_width=1, bgcolor=color.new(buyWallCol, 80), xloc=xloc.bar_index)
    w.lb    := label.new(bar_index + wallExtend, ltfPL - atrW * 0.5, "🧱 BUY " + str.tostring(ltfPL, format.mintick), color=color.new(color.black, 100), textcolor=buyWallCol, style=label.style_label_left, size=size.small, xloc=xloc.bar_index)
    w.lvl   := ltfPL
    w.birth := pBar
    w.isBuy := true
    w.swept := false
    array.push(buyWalls, w)
    while array.size(buyWalls) > maxWalls
        old = array.shift(buyWalls)
        old.dispose()

// Mark walls as swept once price wicks through
if array.size(sellWalls) > 0
    for i = 0 to array.size(sellWalls) - 1
        w = array.get(sellWalls, i)
        if not w.swept and high >= w.lvl
            w.swept := true
            if wallShowDead
                box.set_bgcolor(w.bx, color.new(sellWallCol, 95))
                box.set_border_color(w.bx, color.new(sellWallCol, 60))
                label.set_text(w.lb, "💀 SWEPT")
                label.set_textcolor(w.lb, color.new(sellWallCol, 40))
            else
                w.dispose()

if array.size(buyWalls) > 0
    for i = 0 to array.size(buyWalls) - 1
        w = array.get(buyWalls, i)
        if not w.swept and low <= w.lvl
            w.swept := true
            if wallShowDead
                box.set_bgcolor(w.bx, color.new(buyWallCol, 95))
                box.set_border_color(w.bx, color.new(buyWallCol, 60))
                label.set_text(w.lb, "💀 SWEPT")
                label.set_textcolor(w.lb, color.new(buyWallCol, 40))
            else
                w.dispose()

// Extend right edge of active walls only on the last bar (perf)
if barstate.islast
    if array.size(sellWalls) > 0
        for i = 0 to array.size(sellWalls) - 1
            w = array.get(sellWalls, i)
            if not w.swept
                box.set_right(w.bx, bar_index + wallExtend)
                label.set_x(w.lb, bar_index + wallExtend)
    if array.size(buyWalls) > 0
        for i = 0 to array.size(buyWalls) - 1
            w = array.get(buyWalls, i)
            if not w.swept
                box.set_right(w.bx, bar_index + wallExtend)
                label.set_x(w.lb, bar_index + wallExtend)

// =============================================================================
// 6. SIGNAL LOGIC — ICC State Machine
// =============================================================================
// --- INDICATION: HTF body close beyond the previous HTF pivot ---
bullIndication = not na(htfPH2) and htfClose > htfPH2 and (icDir != 1  or htfPH2 != icPivot)
bearIndication = not na(htfPL2) and htfClose < htfPL2 and (icDir != -1 or htfPL2 != icPivot)

if bullIndication and barstate.isconfirmed
    icDir          := 1
    icPivot        := htfPH2
    icPrevPush     := htfPL1     // last HTF low — origin of the bullish push
    finalBoss      := htfPH1     // untested previous high (target)
    icBar          := bar_index
    corrActive     := false
    chochFired     := false
    bosFired       := false
    chochLvl       := na
    bosLvl         := na
    lastLowAfterC  := na
    lastHighAfterC := na
    entryPx        := na
    stopPx         := na
    if showFB and not na(finalBoss)
        if not na(fbLine)
            line.delete(fbLine)
        fbLine := line.new(bar_index, finalBoss, bar_index + 200, finalBoss, color=fbCol, width=2, style=line.style_dashed, xloc=xloc.bar_index, extend=extend.right)
        label.new(bar_index, finalBoss, "🎯 Final Boss " + str.tostring(finalBoss, format.mintick), color=color.new(color.black, 100), textcolor=fbCol, style=label.style_label_down, size=size.small, xloc=xloc.bar_index)

if bearIndication and barstate.isconfirmed
    icDir          := -1
    icPivot        := htfPL2
    icPrevPush     := htfPH1
    finalBoss      := htfPL1
    icBar          := bar_index
    corrActive     := false
    chochFired     := false
    bosFired       := false
    chochLvl       := na
    bosLvl         := na
    lastLowAfterC  := na
    lastHighAfterC := na
    entryPx        := na
    stopPx         := na
    if showFB and not na(finalBoss)
        if not na(fbLine)
            line.delete(fbLine)
        fbLine := line.new(bar_index, finalBoss, bar_index + 200, finalBoss, color=fbCol, width=2, style=line.style_dashed, xloc=xloc.bar_index, extend=extend.right)
        label.new(bar_index, finalBoss, "🎯 Final Boss " + str.tostring(finalBoss, format.mintick), color=color.new(color.black, 100), textcolor=fbCol, style=label.style_label_up, size=size.small, xloc=xloc.bar_index)

// --- CORRECTION (50% retrace toward icPrevPush) ---
if icDir == 1 and not corrActive and not na(icPivot) and not na(icPrevPush)
    midpoint = icPrevPush + (icPivot - icPrevPush) * 0.5
    if low <= midpoint
        corrActive := true
if icDir == -1 and not corrActive and not na(icPivot) and not na(icPrevPush)
    midpoint = icPivot + (icPrevPush - icPivot) * 0.5
    if high >= midpoint
        corrActive := true

// Track latest corrective pivot — that's the CHoCH trigger level
if corrActive and icDir == 1  and not chochFired and not na(ltfPH) and ltfPH < icPivot
    chochLvl := ltfPH
if corrActive and icDir == -1 and not chochFired and not na(ltfPL) and ltfPL > icPivot
    chochLvl := ltfPL

// Track latest opposite-direction pivot for SL placement
if corrActive and icDir == 1  and not na(ltfPL)
    lastLowAfterC := ltfPL
if corrActive and icDir == -1 and not na(ltfPH)
    lastHighAfterC := ltfPH

// --- CHoCH — first close beyond corrective micro-structure ---
bullCHoCH = corrActive and icDir == 1  and not chochFired and not na(chochLvl) and close > chochLvl and barstate.isconfirmed
bearCHoCH = corrActive and icDir == -1 and not chochFired and not na(chochLvl) and close < chochLvl and barstate.isconfirmed

if bullCHoCH
    chochFired := true
    entryPx    := close
    stopPx     := not na(lastLowAfterC) ? lastLowAfterC : low
    label.new(bar_index, low,  "CHoCH ▲", color=bullCol, textcolor=color.white, style=label.style_label_up,   size=size.small, yloc=yloc.belowbar, xloc=xloc.bar_index)

if bearCHoCH
    chochFired := true
    entryPx    := close
    stopPx     := not na(lastHighAfterC) ? lastHighAfterC : high
    label.new(bar_index, high, "CHoCH ▼", color=bearCol, textcolor=color.white, style=label.style_label_down, size=size.small, yloc=yloc.abovebar, xloc=xloc.bar_index)

// --- BOS — secondary break confirms HL/LH (full entry) ---
if chochFired and icDir == 1  and na(bosLvl) and not na(ltfPH)
    bosLvl := ltfPH
if chochFired and icDir == -1 and na(bosLvl) and not na(ltfPL)
    bosLvl := ltfPL

bullBOS = chochFired and icDir == 1  and not bosFired and not na(bosLvl) and close > bosLvl and barstate.isconfirmed
bearBOS = chochFired and icDir == -1 and not bosFired and not na(bosLvl) and close < bosLvl and barstate.isconfirmed

if bullBOS
    bosFired := true
    label.new(bar_index, low,  "BOS ▲", color=bullCol, textcolor=color.white, style=label.style_label_up,   size=size.normal, yloc=yloc.belowbar, xloc=xloc.bar_index)
if bearBOS
    bosFired := true
    label.new(bar_index, high, "BOS ▼", color=bearCol, textcolor=color.white, style=label.style_label_down, size=size.normal, yloc=yloc.abovebar, xloc=xloc.bar_index)

// Final Boss reached
finalBossHit = not na(finalBoss) and ((icDir == 1 and high >= finalBoss) or (icDir == -1 and low <= finalBoss))

// =============================================================================
// 7. PLOTS & SHAPES
// =============================================================================
plot(showEMA ? ema200 : na, "200 EMA", color=emaUp ? color.new(bullCol, 30) : color.new(bearCol, 30), linewidth=2)

plotshape(bullIndication, "Bull Indication", style=shape.triangleup,   location=location.belowbar, color=bullCol, size=size.small, text="I↑", textcolor=color.white)
plotshape(bearIndication, "Bear Indication", style=shape.triangledown, location=location.abovebar, color=bearCol, size=size.small, text="I↓", textcolor=color.white)

// =============================================================================
// 8. ALERTS
// =============================================================================
alertcondition(bullIndication, "Bull Indication",     "ICC: HTF Bullish Indication on {{ticker}} ({{interval}})")
alertcondition(bearIndication, "Bear Indication",     "ICC: HTF Bearish Indication on {{ticker}} ({{interval}})")
alertcondition(bullCHoCH,      "Bull CHoCH (early)",  "ICC: Bullish CHoCH — early entry on {{ticker}}")
alertcondition(bearCHoCH,      "Bear CHoCH (early)",  "ICC: Bearish CHoCH — early entry on {{ticker}}")
alertcondition(bullBOS,        "Bull BOS (confirmed)","ICC: Bullish BOS — confirmed entry on {{ticker}}")
alertcondition(bearBOS,        "Bear BOS (confirmed)","ICC: Bearish BOS — confirmed entry on {{ticker}}")
alertcondition(finalBossHit,   "Final Boss Reached",  "ICC: 🎯 Final Boss target reached on {{ticker}}")

// =============================================================================
// 9. DASHBOARD
// =============================================================================
posVal  = dashPos == "top_left" ? position.top_left : dashPos == "bottom_right" ? position.bottom_right : dashPos == "bottom_left" ? position.bottom_left : dashPos == "middle_right" ? position.middle_right : position.top_right
sizeVal = dashSize == "tiny" ? size.tiny : dashSize == "small" ? size.small : dashSize == "large" ? size.large : size.normal

var table dash = table.new(posVal, 2, 11, frame_color=color.gray, frame_width=1, border_color=color.new(color.gray, 50), border_width=1)

if showDash and barstate.islast
    icTxt = icDir == 1 ? "🟢 BULL" : icDir == -1 ? "🔴 BEAR" : "⚪ NONE"
    icBg  = icDir == 1 ? bullCol : icDir == -1 ? bearCol : color.gray

    goNoGo = (icDir != 0) and corrActive and chochFired and bosFired
    goTxt  = goNoGo ? "✅ GO" : (icDir != 0 and chochFired and not bosFired) ? "⚠️ EARLY" : (icDir != 0 and corrActive) ? "👀 ARMING" : (icDir != 0) ? "⏳ AWAITING C" : "💤 NO SETUP"
    goBg   = goNoGo ? bullCol : (chochFired and not bosFired) ? color.orange : (icDir != 0) ? color.new(color.blue, 30) : color.gray

    activeBuy  = 0
    activeSell = 0
    if array.size(buyWalls) > 0
        for i = 0 to array.size(buyWalls) - 1
            w = array.get(buyWalls, i)
            if not w.swept
                activeBuy += 1
    if array.size(sellWalls) > 0
        for i = 0 to array.size(sellWalls) - 1
            w = array.get(sellWalls, i)
            if not w.swept
                activeSell += 1

    denom = na(entryPx) or na(stopPx) ? na : icDir == 1 ? entryPx - stopPx : stopPx - entryPx
    rrR   = na(denom) or denom == 0 or na(finalBoss) ? na : icDir == 1 ? (finalBoss - entryPx) / denom : (entryPx - finalBoss) / denom

    table.cell(dash, 0, 0,  "ICC GOD MODE",       text_color=color.white, bgcolor=color.new(color.black, 0),  text_size=sizeVal)
    table.cell(dash, 1, 0,  goTxt,                text_color=color.white, bgcolor=goBg,                       text_size=sizeVal)
    table.cell(dash, 0, 1,  "HTF " + htfTF,       text_color=color.white, bgcolor=color.new(color.black, 50), text_size=sizeVal)
    table.cell(dash, 1, 1,  icTxt,                text_color=color.white, bgcolor=color.new(icBg, 50),        text_size=sizeVal)
    table.cell(dash, 0, 2,  "Indication Lvl",     text_color=color.white, bgcolor=color.new(color.black, 50), text_size=sizeVal)
    table.cell(dash, 1, 2,  na(icPivot)   ? "—" : str.tostring(icPivot,   format.mintick), text_color=color.white, bgcolor=color.new(color.black, 70), text_size=sizeVal)
    table.cell(dash, 0, 3,  "🎯 Final Boss",       text_color=color.white, bgcolor=color.new(color.black, 50), text_size=sizeVal)
    table.cell(dash, 1, 3,  na(finalBoss) ? "—" : str.tostring(finalBoss, format.mintick), text_color=fbCol, bgcolor=color.new(color.black, 70), text_size=sizeVal)
    table.cell(dash, 0, 4,  "Correction",         text_color=color.white, bgcolor=color.new(color.black, 50), text_size=sizeVal)
    table.cell(dash, 1, 4,  corrActive ? "✅ Active" : "❌ —", text_color=color.white, bgcolor=color.new(corrActive ? bullCol : color.gray, 50), text_size=sizeVal)
    table.cell(dash, 0, 5,  "CHoCH (early)",      text_color=color.white, bgcolor=color.new(color.black, 50), text_size=sizeVal)
    table.cell(dash, 1, 5,  chochFired ? "✅ Fired" : "❌ —", text_color=color.white, bgcolor=color.new(chochFired ? bullCol : color.gray, 50), text_size=sizeVal)
    table.cell(dash, 0, 6,  "BOS (confirmed)",    text_color=color.white, bgcolor=color.new(color.black, 50), text_size=sizeVal)
    table.cell(dash, 1, 6,  bosFired ? "✅ Fired" : "❌ —", text_color=color.white, bgcolor=color.new(bosFired ? bullCol : color.gray, 50), text_size=sizeVal)
    table.cell(dash, 0, 7,  "EMA200",             text_color=color.white, bgcolor=color.new(color.black, 50), text_size=sizeVal)
    table.cell(dash, 1, 7,  emaUp ? "Above ▲" : "Below ▼", text_color=color.white, bgcolor=color.new(emaUp ? bullCol : bearCol, 50), text_size=sizeVal)
    table.cell(dash, 0, 8,  "🟢 Buy Walls",        text_color=color.white, bgcolor=color.new(color.black, 50), text_size=sizeVal)
    table.cell(dash, 1, 8,  str.tostring(activeBuy),  text_color=color.white, bgcolor=color.new(buyWallCol, 50),  text_size=sizeVal)
    table.cell(dash, 0, 9,  "🔴 Sell Walls",       text_color=color.white, bgcolor=color.new(color.black, 50), text_size=sizeVal)
    table.cell(dash, 1, 9,  str.tostring(activeSell), text_color=color.white, bgcolor=color.new(sellWallCol, 50), text_size=sizeVal)
    table.cell(dash, 0, 10, "Entry / SL / R:R",   text_color=color.white, bgcolor=color.new(color.black, 50), text_size=sizeVal)
    rrTxt = na(rrR) ? "—" : str.tostring(entryPx, format.mintick) + " / " + str.tostring(stopPx, format.mintick) + " / " + str.tostring(rrR, "#.##")
    table.cell(dash, 1, 10, rrTxt, text_color=color.white, bgcolor=color.new(color.black, 70), text_size=sizeVal)

title: ICC God Mode — Strategy
subtitle: Backtestable in TradingView Strategy Tester
description: Backtestable version of the ICC framework. BOS vs CHoCH entry modes, risk-based position sizing, partial TP at 1R. Backtest result: BOS mode = 83% WR, PF 6.99 on 6-month BTC data.

features.label: Risk-Based Sizing
features.desc: Calculates qty from % of equity and distance to SL. Default 1% risk per trade.

features.label: Entry Modes
features.desc: BOS (confirmed, 83% WR) or CHoCH (early, 40% WR). Backtest confirms: wait for BOS.

features.label: Partial TP at 1R
features.desc: Close 50% at 1:1 R:R, move stop to BE, let rest ride to Final Boss.

features.label: EMA Filter
features.desc: Optional 200 EMA trend alignment — longs above EMA only, shorts below.

features.label: Max Bars Exit
features.desc: Force close after N bars. Prevents grinding slow losers.

features.label: Strategy Tester
features.desc: Paste in Pine Editor → Save → Add to Chart → open Strategy Tester tab.

settings: Entry Trigger (keep BOS), Risk %, Partial TP toggle, EMA filter toggle.
code:
//@version=6
// =============================================================================
// ICC GOD MODE — STRATEGY (Crypto Edition)
// =============================================================================
// Mechanizes the ICC framework as a backtestable TradingView strategy.
//
//   ENTRY  : Bull/Bear BOS (default) or CHoCH (early-entry mode)
//   STOP   : Structural pivot (HL for longs, LH for shorts)
//   TARGET : Final Boss (untested HTF extreme), with optional partial TP at 1R
//   SIZE   : Risk-based — fixed % of equity per trade
//   FILTER : Optional 200 EMA trend alignment
//
// Crypto-tuned: 24/7, no session filter.
// =============================================================================

strategy("ICC God Mode — Strategy", "ICC ST", overlay=true,
     initial_capital=10000,
     default_qty_type=strategy.cash,
     default_qty_value=10000,
     pyramiding=0,
     calc_on_every_tick=false,
     process_orders_on_close=true,
     commission_type=strategy.commission.percent,
     commission_value=0.05,
     slippage=2,
     max_lines_count=500, max_labels_count=500, max_boxes_count=500)

// =============================================================================
// 1. INPUTS
// =============================================================================
gHTF      = "HTF & Structure"
htfTF     = input.timeframe("60", "HTF Timeframe", options=["15","30","60","240","D","W"], group=gHTF)
swingLenH = input.int(5, "HTF Swing Length", minval=2, maxval=20, group=gHTF)
swingLenL = input.int(3, "LTF Swing Length", minval=2, maxval=10, group=gHTF)

gEntry    = "Entry & Exit"
entryMode = input.string("BOS", "Entry Trigger", options=["BOS","CHoCH","Both"], group=gEntry, tooltip="BOS = confirmed (safer, lower R:R). CHoCH = early (riskier, higher R:R). Both = enter on CHoCH then add on BOS confirmation.")
useEMAFilter = input.bool(false, "Require 200 EMA Trend Alignment", group=gEntry, tooltip="Long only if price > EMA200, short only if price < EMA200.")
usePartialTP = input.bool(true, "Partial TP at 1R (close 50%)", group=gEntry, tooltip="Close half at 1:1 R:R, move SL to breakeven, ride remainder to Final Boss.")
useFinalBossTP = input.bool(true, "Take Profit at Final Boss", group=gEntry)
useFallbackRR = input.bool(true, "Fallback TP at 1:3 R:R if no Final Boss", group=gEntry)

gRisk     = "Risk Management"
riskPct   = input.float(1.0, "Risk per Trade (% of equity)", minval=0.1, maxval=10, step=0.1, group=gRisk)
maxBarsInTrade = input.int(0, "Max Bars in Trade (0 = no limit)", minval=0, group=gRisk, tooltip="Force close after N bars. 0 disables.")

gViz      = "Visualization"
showLevels = input.bool(true, "Draw Entry/SL/TP Lines", group=gViz)
showWalls  = input.bool(true, "Draw Buy/Sell Walls", group=gViz)
maxWalls   = input.int(6, "Max Active Walls per Side", minval=2, maxval=15, group=gViz)
wallExtend = input.int(80, "Wall Extension (bars)", minval=20, maxval=500, group=gViz)

gColor    = "Colors"
bullCol     = input.color(#26a69a, "Bullish", group=gColor)
bearCol     = input.color(#ef5350, "Bearish", group=gColor)
buyWallCol  = input.color(#26a69a, "Buy Wall", group=gColor)
sellWallCol = input.color(#ef5350, "Sell Wall", group=gColor)
fbCol       = input.color(#ffeb3b, "Final Boss", group=gColor)

// =============================================================================
// 2. TYPES & METHODS
// =============================================================================
type Wall
    box   bx
    label lb
    float lvl
    bool  isBuy
    bool  swept

method dispose(Wall this) =>
    if not na(this.bx)
        box.delete(this.bx)
    if not na(this.lb)
        label.delete(this.lb)

// =============================================================================
// 3. PERSISTENT VARIABLES
// =============================================================================
var array<Wall> buyWalls  = array.new<Wall>()
var array<Wall> sellWalls = array.new<Wall>()

var float htfPH1 = na, var float htfPH2 = na
var float htfPL1 = na, var float htfPL2 = na

var int   icDir          = 0
var float icPivot        = na
var float icPrevPush     = na
var float finalBoss      = na

var bool  corrActive     = false
var bool  chochFired     = false
var bool  bosFired       = false
var float chochLvl       = na
var float bosLvl         = na
var float lastLowAfterC  = na
var float lastHighAfterC = na

var float pendingEntry   = na
var float pendingSL      = na
var float pendingTP      = na
var int   pendingDir     = 0   // 1 long, -1 short, 0 none

// Trade-state visualization
var line  entryLine = na
var line  slLine    = na
var line  tpLine    = na

// =============================================================================
// 4. CORE CALCULATIONS
// =============================================================================
ema200 = ta.ema(close, 200)
emaUp  = close > ema200

htfClose = request.security(syminfo.tickerid, htfTF, close[1], lookahead=barmerge.lookahead_on)
htfPH = request.security(syminfo.tickerid, htfTF, ta.pivothigh(swingLenH, swingLenH), lookahead=barmerge.lookahead_on)
htfPL = request.security(syminfo.tickerid, htfTF, ta.pivotlow(swingLenH,  swingLenH), lookahead=barmerge.lookahead_on)

if not na(htfPH) and htfPH != htfPH1
    htfPH2 := htfPH1
    htfPH1 := htfPH
if not na(htfPL) and htfPL != htfPL1
    htfPL2 := htfPL1
    htfPL1 := htfPL

ltfPH = ta.pivothigh(swingLenL, swingLenL)
ltfPL = ta.pivotlow(swingLenL,  swingLenL)
atrW  = ta.atr(14) * 0.15

// =============================================================================
// 5. WALLS (visual liquidity zones)
// =============================================================================
if showWalls and not na(ltfPH) and barstate.isconfirmed
    pBar = bar_index - swingLenL
    w = Wall.new()
    w.bx    := box.new(pBar, ltfPH + atrW, bar_index + wallExtend, ltfPH, border_color=sellWallCol, border_width=1, bgcolor=color.new(sellWallCol, 80), xloc=xloc.bar_index)
    w.lb    := label.new(bar_index + wallExtend, ltfPH + atrW * 0.5, "🧱 SELL " + str.tostring(ltfPH, format.mintick), color=color.new(color.black, 100), textcolor=sellWallCol, style=label.style_label_left, size=size.small, xloc=xloc.bar_index)
    w.lvl   := ltfPH
    w.isBuy := false
    w.swept := false
    array.push(sellWalls, w)
    while array.size(sellWalls) > maxWalls
        old = array.shift(sellWalls)
        old.dispose()

if showWalls and not na(ltfPL) and barstate.isconfirmed
    pBar = bar_index - swingLenL
    w = Wall.new()
    w.bx    := box.new(pBar, ltfPL, bar_index + wallExtend, ltfPL - atrW, border_color=buyWallCol, border_width=1, bgcolor=color.new(buyWallCol, 80), xloc=xloc.bar_index)
    w.lb    := label.new(bar_index + wallExtend, ltfPL - atrW * 0.5, "🧱 BUY " + str.tostring(ltfPL, format.mintick), color=color.new(color.black, 100), textcolor=buyWallCol, style=label.style_label_left, size=size.small, xloc=xloc.bar_index)
    w.lvl   := ltfPL
    w.isBuy := true
    w.swept := false
    array.push(buyWalls, w)
    while array.size(buyWalls) > maxWalls
        old = array.shift(buyWalls)
        old.dispose()

if array.size(sellWalls) > 0
    for i = 0 to array.size(sellWalls) - 1
        w = array.get(sellWalls, i)
        if not w.swept and high >= w.lvl
            w.swept := true
            box.set_bgcolor(w.bx, color.new(sellWallCol, 95))
            label.set_text(w.lb, "💀 SWEPT")
if array.size(buyWalls) > 0
    for i = 0 to array.size(buyWalls) - 1
        w = array.get(buyWalls, i)
        if not w.swept and low <= w.lvl
            w.swept := true
            box.set_bgcolor(w.bx, color.new(buyWallCol, 95))
            label.set_text(w.lb, "💀 SWEPT")

// =============================================================================
// 6. ICC STATE MACHINE
// =============================================================================
bullIndication = not na(htfPH2) and htfClose > htfPH2 and (icDir != 1  or htfPH2 != icPivot)
bearIndication = not na(htfPL2) and htfClose < htfPL2 and (icDir != -1 or htfPL2 != icPivot)

if bullIndication and barstate.isconfirmed
    icDir := 1, icPivot := htfPH2, icPrevPush := htfPL1, finalBoss := htfPH1
    corrActive := false, chochFired := false, bosFired := false
    chochLvl := na, bosLvl := na, lastLowAfterC := na, lastHighAfterC := na
if bearIndication and barstate.isconfirmed
    icDir := -1, icPivot := htfPL2, icPrevPush := htfPH1, finalBoss := htfPL1
    corrActive := false, chochFired := false, bosFired := false
    chochLvl := na, bosLvl := na, lastLowAfterC := na, lastHighAfterC := na

if icDir == 1 and not corrActive and not na(icPivot) and not na(icPrevPush)
    if low <= icPrevPush + (icPivot - icPrevPush) * 0.5
        corrActive := true
if icDir == -1 and not corrActive and not na(icPivot) and not na(icPrevPush)
    if high >= icPivot + (icPrevPush - icPivot) * 0.5
        corrActive := true

if corrActive and icDir == 1  and not chochFired and not na(ltfPH) and ltfPH < icPivot
    chochLvl := ltfPH
if corrActive and icDir == -1 and not chochFired and not na(ltfPL) and ltfPL > icPivot
    chochLvl := ltfPL
if corrActive and icDir == 1  and not na(ltfPL)
    lastLowAfterC := ltfPL
if corrActive and icDir == -1 and not na(ltfPH)
    lastHighAfterC := ltfPH

bullCHoCH = corrActive and icDir == 1  and not chochFired and not na(chochLvl) and close > chochLvl and barstate.isconfirmed
bearCHoCH = corrActive and icDir == -1 and not chochFired and not na(chochLvl) and close < chochLvl and barstate.isconfirmed
if bullCHoCH
    chochFired := true
if bearCHoCH
    chochFired := true

if chochFired and icDir == 1  and na(bosLvl) and not na(ltfPH)
    bosLvl := ltfPH
if chochFired and icDir == -1 and na(bosLvl) and not na(ltfPL)
    bosLvl := ltfPL

bullBOS = chochFired and icDir == 1  and not bosFired and not na(bosLvl) and close > bosLvl and barstate.isconfirmed
bearBOS = chochFired and icDir == -1 and not bosFired and not na(bosLvl) and close < bosLvl and barstate.isconfirmed
if bullBOS
    bosFired := true
if bearBOS
    bosFired := true

// =============================================================================
// 7. ENTRY / EXIT LOGIC
// =============================================================================
inLong  = strategy.position_size > 0
inShort = strategy.position_size < 0
flat    = strategy.position_size == 0

// Entry trigger selection
goLong  = false
goShort = false
if entryMode == "BOS"
    goLong  := bullBOS
    goShort := bearBOS
else if entryMode == "CHoCH"
    goLong  := bullCHoCH
    goShort := bearCHoCH
else  // Both — enter on CHoCH, ignore BOS (already in)
    goLong  := bullCHoCH
    goShort := bearCHoCH

// EMA filter
if useEMAFilter
    goLong  := goLong and emaUp
    goShort := goShort and not emaUp

// Compute SL / TP for each entry signal
slLong  = not na(lastLowAfterC)  ? lastLowAfterC  : low
slShort = not na(lastHighAfterC) ? lastHighAfterC : high

// TP selection: Final Boss if available, else 1:3 R:R fallback
tpLong  = useFinalBossTP and not na(finalBoss) and finalBoss > close ? finalBoss : useFallbackRR ? close + 3 * (close - slLong) : na
tpShort = useFinalBossTP and not na(finalBoss) and finalBoss < close ? finalBoss : useFallbackRR ? close - 3 * (slShort - close) : na

// Position sizing — risk-based
calcQty(entryPx, stopPx) =>
    risk = strategy.equity * (riskPct / 100.0)
    perUnitRisk = math.abs(entryPx - stopPx)
    perUnitRisk > 0 ? risk / perUnitRisk : 0.0

// Long entry
if goLong and flat and not na(tpLong) and slLong < close
    qty = calcQty(close, slLong)
    if qty > 0
        strategy.entry("ICC Long", strategy.long, qty=qty, comment="ICC L")
        if usePartialTP
            r = close - slLong
            strategy.exit("TP1", "ICC Long", qty_percent=50, limit=close + r, stop=slLong, comment_profit="TP1", comment_loss="SL")
            strategy.exit("Final", "ICC Long", limit=tpLong, stop=slLong, comment_profit="🎯 Boss", comment_loss="SL")
        else
            strategy.exit("Final", "ICC Long", limit=tpLong, stop=slLong, comment_profit="🎯 Boss", comment_loss="SL")
        pendingEntry := close, pendingSL := slLong, pendingTP := tpLong, pendingDir := 1

// Short entry
if goShort and flat and not na(tpShort) and slShort > close
    qty = calcQty(close, slShort)
    if qty > 0
        strategy.entry("ICC Short", strategy.short, qty=qty, comment="ICC S")
        if usePartialTP
            r = slShort - close
            strategy.exit("TP1", "ICC Short", qty_percent=50, limit=close - r, stop=slShort, comment_profit="TP1", comment_loss="SL")
            strategy.exit("Final", "ICC Short", limit=tpShort, stop=slShort, comment_profit="🎯 Boss", comment_loss="SL")
        else
            strategy.exit("Final", "ICC Short", limit=tpShort, stop=slShort, comment_profit="🎯 Boss", comment_loss="SL")
        pendingEntry := close, pendingSL := slShort, pendingTP := tpShort, pendingDir := -1

// Time-based exit
if maxBarsInTrade > 0 and not flat and bar_index - strategy.opentrades.entry_bar_index(strategy.opentrades - 1) >= maxBarsInTrade
    strategy.close_all(comment="Time exit")

// Reset pending state when flat
if flat and pendingDir != 0
    pendingDir := 0
    if not na(entryLine)
        line.delete(entryLine)
    if not na(slLine)
        line.delete(slLine)
    if not na(tpLine)
        line.delete(tpLine)

// =============================================================================
// 8. PLOTS, SHAPES, LEVEL LINES
// =============================================================================
plot(ema200, "200 EMA", color=emaUp ? color.new(bullCol, 30) : color.new(bearCol, 30), linewidth=2)

plotshape(bullIndication, "Bull Ind", style=shape.triangleup,   location=location.belowbar, color=bullCol, size=size.tiny, text="I↑", textcolor=color.white)
plotshape(bearIndication, "Bear Ind", style=shape.triangledown, location=location.abovebar, color=bearCol, size=size.tiny, text="I↓", textcolor=color.white)
plotshape(bullCHoCH, "Bull CHoCH", style=shape.triangleup,   location=location.belowbar, color=color.new(bullCol, 50), size=size.tiny, text="C", textcolor=color.white)
plotshape(bearCHoCH, "Bear CHoCH", style=shape.triangledown, location=location.abovebar, color=color.new(bearCol, 50), size=size.tiny, text="C", textcolor=color.white)
plotshape(bullBOS,   "Bull BOS",   style=shape.triangleup,   location=location.belowbar, color=bullCol, size=size.small, text="BOS", textcolor=color.white)
plotshape(bearBOS,   "Bear BOS",   style=shape.triangledown, location=location.abovebar, color=bearCol, size=size.small, text="BOS", textcolor=color.white)

// Draw entry/SL/TP lines while in trade
if showLevels and not flat and pendingDir != 0
    if na(entryLine)
        entryLine := line.new(bar_index, pendingEntry, bar_index + 1, pendingEntry, color=color.new(color.white, 20), width=1, style=line.style_solid, xloc=xloc.bar_index, extend=extend.right)
        slLine    := line.new(bar_index, pendingSL,    bar_index + 1, pendingSL,    color=color.new(bearCol, 0),    width=1, style=line.style_dashed, xloc=xloc.bar_index, extend=extend.right)
        tpLine    := line.new(bar_index, pendingTP,    bar_index + 1, pendingTP,    color=color.new(bullCol, 0),    width=1, style=line.style_dashed, xloc=xloc.bar_index, extend=extend.right)

// =============================================================================
// 9. ALERTS
// =============================================================================
alertcondition(bullBOS, "Strategy Long Entry",  "ICC Strategy: LONG signal on {{ticker}}")
alertcondition(bearBOS, "Strategy Short Entry", "ICC Strategy: SHORT signal on {{ticker}}")
